task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into SciNote.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote main dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the team creation interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Team', 'Create Team', or similar modal/form is open in the SciNote UI.

task_completion.description: Verify the team 'CRISPR Gene Therapy Consortium' was successfully created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'CRISPR Gene Therapy Consortium' appears in the teams list, sidebar, or team selection dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent started creating a project within the newly created team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Project' form or dialog is open, and the active team context in the UI is shown as 'CRISPR Gene Therapy Consortium'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project 'AAV Vector Optimization Study' was successfully created within the team's workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project 'AAV Vector Optimization Study' is visible in the project list, dashboard, or project overview, specifically under the 'CRISPR Gene Therapy Consortium' team workspace.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SciNote web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The web browser running SciNote is visible. There are no terminal windows executing curl commands, Python scripts, or database queries to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SciNote application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine SciNote interface and URL, rather than a text editor, mock HTML file, or manipulated screenshot.

integrity.description: Verify the project was created inside the newly created team, not a pre-existing or default team.
integrity.visual_evidence: The active team dropdown, sidebar, or breadcrumbs explicitly show 'CRISPR Gene Therapy Consortium' when the project 'AAV Vector Optimization Study' is being created or displayed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected team name is exactly 'CRISPR Gene Therapy Consortium'. The expected project name is exactly 'AAV Vector Optimization Study'.
